race.comment: This is tricky. CRAIG'S ONE (6) has two placings from three runs this campaign, finishing 1.2 lengths away in third most recently over 1200m at Tamworth. Races on the speed and is back in grade. They've elected not to claim today, and Buckley can get him home. DUSAN (3) was quickly back to his best over 1100m at Armidale, beaten only 1.5 lengths. Keeps a handy 3kg claim and should position handy. Likely improver with strong prospects. WHERE'S THE FIRE (5) really lengthened winning over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Jumps from an inside barrier today and he also has winning claims. ENSIGN PARKER (1) resumes from the inside barrier and has a 3kg claim. He has won first-up and has generally been racing in tougher than this. Has pieces of form that stack up and he deserves a betting watch.
